message:
fix(engine): length-prefixed hashing in governance exports, prototype chain depth limit, and numeric safety

governance_hooks.rs:
- PolicySource::Display for git_repo uses get(..8).unwrap_or() instead
  of indexing [..8] to prevent panic on short commit SHAs
- export_audit_evidence() and generate_compliance_bundle() add length
  prefix before format/framework strings in ID canonical bytes to
  prevent concatenation-ambiguity collisions
- compute_bundle_hash() prefixes entries.len() as u64 BE bytes before
  chaining entry hashes, preventing empty-vs-nonempty ambiguity
- execute_hook() compliance rate calculation uses saturating_mul and
  checked_div to prevent overflow and division-by-zero

object_model.rs:
- Prototype chain traversal now enforces MAX_PROTOTYPE_CHAIN_DEPTH
  with a depth counter, returning PrototypeChainTooDeep error instead
  of potentially running unbounded on malicious prototype chains

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
